articles.title: A French Navy officer accidentally leaked the location of an aircraft carrier by logging his run on Strava
articles.description: A French naval officer went on a run around the deck of the Charles de Gaulle aircraft carrier, inadvertently leaking the warship's location when he uploaded the workout to Strava.

topStories.title: "Same Script, Different Stage": Iran Invokes Vietnam War In US Critique
topStories.description: Seyed Abbas Araghchi, writing on his official X account, claimed American officials had once sought to project confidence even as the Vietnam War turned against them.

topStories.title: U.S. accuses Iran’s government of operating hacktivist group that hacked Stryker
topStories.description: The U.S. Justice Department said an Iranian security ministry operates the fake activist persona known as Handala, which claimed responsibility for the destructive hack targeting medical tech giant Stryker.

dailyNews.title: What US-Israeli targets reveal about Iran war goals three weeks in
dailyNews.description: From degradation of military to efforts to foment unrest, targets show array of objectives but no single endgame.

dailyNews.title: Switzerland announces halt to weapons exports to US amid Iran war
dailyNews.description: Move comes as Swiss government also closed its airspace to US military flights directly linked to the Iran war.

dailyNews.title: 'Deserves perfect score': IRGC spokesman Ali Mohammad Naini lauded missile programme before US-Israel strike killed him
dailyNews.description: Prior to his death, Ali Mohammad Naini lauded Tehran's missile programme, stating it ‘deserves a perfect score’. Following Israeli airstrikes, Iran intensified its offensive, targeting oil infrastructure while vowing to continue missile production despite ongoing conflict.

dailyNews.title: US easing ban on Iranian oil would signal ‘beginning of the end of war’
dailyNews.description: The US says it is considering removing sanctions on Iranian oil stranded on tankers at sea.

dailyNews.title: Chuck Norris dies at 86: All about the Walker, Texas Ranger star’s cause of death, films and famous jokes
dailyNews.description: The 86-year-old actor was admitted to a hospital in Hawaii — just days after celebrating his 86th birthday — after an unknown incident occurred on the island of Kauai.

dailyNews.title: Cyberattack on vehicle breathalyzer company leaves drivers stranded across the US
dailyNews.description: A cyberattack on a U.S. car breathalyzer company has left drivers across the United States reportedly stranded and unable to start their vehicles.

dailyNews.title: Will Russian oil be the biggest winner in the US-Israel war on Iran?
dailyNews.description: The price of Russian Urals has soared in recent weeks. How Russia - and other energy producing nations - could profit.

dailyNews.title: ‘Not marrying a maid’: Supreme Court says wife's refusal to do household chores not cruelty
dailyNews.description: On the husband seeking divorce on grounds of cruelty, the court highlighted that times have changed and the husband must also contribute to household chores.

dailyNews.title: ‘Cowards’: Donald Trump hits out at ‘paper tiger’ NATO over lack of support for Iran war
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump criticized NATO allies for their insufficient backing in the war against Iran, claiming that NATO is ineffective without American support.

dailyNews.title: Zelenskyy says Ukraine wants timeline for next round of Russia talks
dailyNews.description: Volodymyr Zelenskyy says 'clear dates' needed as Ukrainian negotiators prepare for discussions in US.

dailyNews.title: ‘Unconscious, leaned onto cord’: What is the ‘Blackout’ social media challenge that claimed one life in Texas?
dailyNews.description: In 2022, a UK-based media report mentioned that at least 20 deaths had been linked to the blackout challenge within 18 months, with 15 of the victims being 12 or younger. Here's all you need to know about the trend which cost a nine-year-old from Texas her life

topStories.title: ‘Had you been neutral…’: Owaisi slams PM Modi, Pakistan over ‘siding with Israel’ in Iran war
topStories.description: “Modi deposited himself in the corner of Trump and Netanyahu. Had you been neutral, perhaps there would have been weight in your words,” AIMIM chief said.

topStories.title: Iran conflict won’t trigger Biden-style refugee replay, expert predicts
topStories.description: An immigration expert says Iran's instability is unlikely to trigger a Syrian- or Afghan-style refugee surge, as the Trump admin signals no intake plan.

topStories.title: Piers Morgan panel derails as far-left guest erupts over Iran war, slams Israel
topStories.description: Cenk Uygur clashed with Piers Morgan and panelists during a heated debate over President Donald Trump, Israel and U.S. involvement in Iran on "Piers Morgan Uncensored."

topStories.title: DAVID MARCUS: The MAGA 'civil war' over Iran is a myth
topStories.description: Polls show 83% of Republicans back Trump's Iran strikes, undermining media claims of a MAGA split over the conflict, according to L&V and Politico surveys.

topStories.title: Deferring to Trump, G.O.P. Lawmakers Resist a Public Accounting on Iran
topStories.description: Nearly three weeks into a war that polls show is unpopular, top Republicans have yet to call administration officials to testify about it, arguing that hearings would put divisions on display.

topStories.title: Iran War Underscores the Diverging Aims of Trump and Netanyahu
topStories.description: The United States views Iran through a prism of global responsibilities and strategic goals. Israel has a more regional approach. After nearly three weeks of war, their paths are diverging.

topStories.title: U.S. Prosecutors Are Investigating Colombia President Gustavo Petro
topStories.description: The Justice Department is examining whether President Gustavo Petro of Colombia has ties to drug traffickers.

dailyNews.title: Trump Friend Asked ICE to Detain the Mother of His Child
dailyNews.description: Paolo Zampolli, a former modeling agent and a longtime Trump ally, was in a custody battle over his son. An ICE official agreed to help.

dailyNews.title: A Meatpacking Strike in Colorado Is Another Stress to Trump’s Economy
dailyNews.description: The walkout at the JBS plant in Greeley, Colo., comes as beef prices have soared, cattle supplies have plunged and immigration sweeps have stressed the labor supply.

dailyNews.title: Alexander Brothers Are Said to Seek Trump Pardons for Sex Trafficking
dailyNews.description: People representing the three brothers have reached out to a lobbyist and an influential Jewish group that have supported clemency for others. There are no signs the White House is considering a pardon.

dailyNews.title: Trump calls NATO allies "cowards" as more Marines head toward Middle East
dailyNews.description: The Iran war is nearing the three-week mark as about 2,200 more U.S. Marines and three more warships are headed toward the region, two U.S. officials say.

dailyNews.title: Mexican president says citizen deaths in U.S. custody "can't be happening"
dailyNews.description: Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum on Friday condemned the deaths of three Mexican nationals in ICE custody this year.

dailyNews.title: NATO pulls several hundred personnel from Iraq amid Iran war
dailyNews.description: The announcement comes as NATO faces criticism from President Trump, who's seeking military assistance in securing the key Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: U.S. sues Harvard, alleging it failed to protect Jewish and Israeli students
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration argued that Harvard unlawfully discriminated against Jewish and Israeli students, in violation of federal civil rights law.

dailyNews.title: Trump: U.S. could end Iran military operations 'right now' but will continue so Iran can 'never rebuild'
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump's comments followed reports that the Pentagon is sending up to 2,500 more Marines to the Middle East from San Diego.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration unveils national AI policy framework to limit state power
dailyNews.description: AI industry leaders have opposed state-level regulatory efforts, arguing that a "patchwork" of laws would hobble innovation and give China a competitive edge.

dailyNews.title: Elizabeth Warren demands answers on costs, economic impact of 'illegal and reckless war'
dailyNews.description: The liberal Democratic firebrand ripped President Donald Trump, whom she said has 'dragged the United States into an illegal and reckless war.'

dailyNews.title: Trump admin tasks Treasury Dept. with student loan collection. What borrowers need to know
dailyNews.description: Trump officials plan to task the Treasury Department with collecting on defaulted student loans and eventually "operational support" on current loans.
